query:
SELECT
            users.id AS user_id,
            display_name,
            users.email,
            email_configs.id AS email_config_id,
            email_configs.verified_at,
            email_configs.active
        FROM users
            INNER JOIN email_configs
            ON users.id = email_configs.user_id
            AND users.email = email_configs.email_address
        WHERE
            users.id = $1
